element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Primary combat mechanic; defeats most enemies; extends jump distance
Health recovery via food items; core resource management
Grants fire-breathing ability for stronger enemy defeat
Offensive tool; damages Taz if consumed; risk/reward mechanic
Throwable hazard; damages Taz if eaten; enemy-specific usage

typical_relief_triggers: Clearing enemy clusters via spin attack
typical_tension_triggers: Encountering stronger enemies requiring chilli power-up
Hazardous throw items (bombs, weed killer) in environment
Platforming challenges requiring spin attack precision
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Moderate difficulty with accessible early game; gradual introduction of hazard mechanics; reviewers noted 'not tough enough for hardened platform veterans' suggesting gentle overall tension curve

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible; basic jump and spin mechanics introduced in safe contexts; emphasis on learning core actions
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Power-up variations introduced (chilli pepper, invincibility star); stronger enemy types requiring tactical spin use
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dangerous consumables prevalent (bombs, weed killer); approach to Lost Valley with implied escalating challenges
notable_spikes: Introduction of hazardous throw items that damage Taz if consumed (risk/reward shift)
Transition to stronger enemy encounters requiring chilli pepper acquisition

notable_level_patterns.description: Stages form a journey across the island toward Lost Valley; each level advances the narrative goal of locating the giant bird egg
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Generic early-stage structure (unspecified level names in source)

notable_level_patterns.description: Early levels emphasize safe eating mechanics (health items, lives); mid-game introduces beneficial consumables (chilli, star); late-game escalates to damaging consumables (bombs, weed killer) requiring careful resource judgment
Tornado spin serves combat, movement (extra jump distance), and obstacle bypass functions; repeated platforming pattern relying on mastery
